checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: Cloudflare detected (passive — no active challenge)
No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt blocks AI bots: anthropic
robots.txt references a sitemap
sitemap.xml found with ~372 URLs
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
No JSON-LD structured data found
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 433 divs with only 20 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 138/173 interactive elements have labels
Forms need work: 0/3 inputs have names, 3/3 have types
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Very little content without JavaScript
Heading hierarchy has 1 level skip(s) (e.g., h1 → h3)
7 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
2 links with generic text ('click here', 'read more')
Good link accessibility: 145/154 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Server accepts DELETE on main page (no method validation)

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~73,320 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 1% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 23 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~5,364 tokens (7% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.09–$1.10 per load ($0.46–$5.50 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation
No images found
Found 2 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
No custom tabindex — relying on natural focus order (fine for simple pages)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 142ms
Compact payload: 44KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Lean resources: 0 scripts, 0 styles, 0 images
Compression enabled: br
